title: podman-remote fails buildah `build-with-omit-history-to-true should not add history` test
body:
To keep everything in order, a dedicated issue carried over from https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/14526:

```
[+0153s] ok 11 build-with-inline-platform-amd-but-tag-as-arm
[+0157s] not ok 12 build-with-omit-history-to-true should not add history
[+0157s] # (from function `assert' in file tests/helpers.bash, line 465,
[+0157s] #  from function `expect_output' in file tests/helpers.bash, line 492,
[+0157s] #  in test file tests/bud.bats, line 219)
[+0157s] #   `expect_output "[]"' failed
```

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
@rhatdan Yes cause I think this is not yet implemented on remote end I'll add this.

This is already implemented here: https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/14561 and test is not skipped any more can be verified here: https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/test/buildah-bud/apply-podman-deltas hence closing this issue.
